title: microthlaspi natolicum subsp. longistylum
intro: Microthlaspi natolicum subsp. longistylum, also known as Long-styled Balkan Penny-cress, is a plant species in the Brassicaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as arthritis, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to provide relief from pain, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, among other health benefits. In herbal preparations, Microthlaspi natolicum subsp. longistylum is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
